note: SEED gold set for boundary-judge calibration (trust-layer P3). humanLabel = the verdict a human gives: 'pass' = the judge SHOULD allow, 'fail' = the judge SHOULD bounce. Seeded from canonical incidents; the domain owner (Nathan) grows this to ~100 labels across grounding / goal_fidelity / numeric_grounding and re-baselines kappa on a model-version bump. Snapshot-guarded: any edit is a reviewable diff.
